meals.name: Breakfast: Scrambled Eggs and Avocado Toast
meals.reason: High protein and healthy fats for energy and muscle recovery
swaps: Swap avocado with 1 tbsp hummus for a different flavor profile

meals.name: Mid-Morning Snack: Greek Yogurt with Berries
meals.reason: Protein and antioxidants to support overall health
swaps: Replace honey with maple syrup for a different sweetener

meals.name: Lunch: Grilled Chicken Salad
meals.reason: Lean protein and fiber-rich vegetables for satiety and muscle recovery
swaps: Swap chicken for tofu for a plant-based option

meals.name: Afternoon Snack: Apple Slices with Almond Butter
meals.reason: Fiber and healthy fats for sustained energy
swaps: Swap almond butter with sunflower seed butter for a nut-free alternative

meals.name: Dinner: Baked Salmon with Quinoa and Steamed Broccoli
meals.reason: Omega-3 fatty acids and complex carbohydrates for muscle recovery and energy
swaps: Swap salmon for tofu for a plant-based option

meals.name: Evening Snack: Cottage Cheese with Pineapple
meals.reason: Protein and vitamin C for muscle recovery and immune support
swaps: Replace pineapple with mango for a different tropical flavor
